titleStmt.title: SII 41.374: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 374. (A.R. No. 589 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the goddess temple in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple at Vijayamaṅgalam.

p.hi: Koṅgu, Sundara-Pāṇḍya, Year 27 = c. 14th century A.D.

summary.p: Gift of money (140 paṇam) for a perpetual lamp by a member of VeḷḷāḷanVeṇmaṇikaḷ clan of Vijaiyamangam. The goddess is called Tirukkamakkottatt-Aludaiya-Nachchiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellā niṉṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu taittiṅkaḷ mutalāka kuṟuppuṉāṭṭu vicaiyamaṅkalattu Āḷuṭaiyār tirunāgīśvaramuṭaiyār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu Āḷuṭaiya nācciyāṟku vicaiya maṅkalattu veḷḷāḷaṉ
veṇmaṇikaḷil tuṇaiyan Āṇṭāṉāna Ampalap perumāḷeṉ vaitta tirunantā viḷakku Oṉṟukku Oṭukkiṉa paṇam nūṟṟunāṟpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭomik koyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaril māṭalagotrattuvetaṉ śivajñāna paṇṭitaṉu māṭala gotrattup piḷḷaiyāḻvi vāḻavantāṉum Ātraya
gotrattucaṅkātiṉampi māṇikkaṉāyaka paṇṭitaṉum Immūvarom Ivviḷakku muṭṭil yiraṭṭi Erippatākavum Itu mikamuṭṭil teṇṭamiṟuppatākavum Itu candrāditya varai kuṭaṅkoṇṭu koyil pukuvāṉ Erippatākavum Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.374 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
